rationale: In the literature review section on advertising, information, and consideration sets, the cited paper is used for a specific conceptual role rather than as a generic background list item. The citing paper explicitly contrasts its contribution with this prior stream, stating that it extends the stream by documenting competitor-awareness spillovers. Although the citation is brief, it materially supports the paper's framing of what is new relative to prior advertising-awareness models.
relation_description: Sahni (2016) cites Draganska and Klapper (2011) as prior work that models advertising as increasing awareness/consideration of the advertised product. It then positions its own contribution as extending that line by showing experimentally that ads can also increase consideration of nonadvertised competitors, generating spillovers.
